message:
test(visual-fx): add alpha blending correctness tests (bd-l8x9.8)

Add 7 new tests in alpha_blending_correctness module verifying:
- backdrop_composition_matches_explicit_over_math
- backdrop_scrim_applies_correctly_over_effect
- backdrop_zero_effect_opacity_shows_only_base_and_scrim
- backdrop_full_effect_opacity_dominates
- packed_rgba_over_is_commutative_only_for_opaque
- backdrop_deterministic_across_renders
- stacked_fx_alpha_matches_sequential_over

Also adds tiny-area safety tests for 1x1, 1xN, Nx1 dimensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
